description: Nudge prompts injected when the agent stalls or needs guidance

prompts.has_read_not_edited: You already read the file. Now use edit_file to apply your fix. Provide start_line, end_line, and new_text. Only replace the lines that change.
prompts.described_not_applied: You described changes but didn't apply them. First read_file to locate exact line numbers, then use edit_file with start_line, end_line, and new_text.
prompts.quality_issues_prefix: UNRESOLVED QUALITY ISSUES — fix these before finishing:
prompts.verify_unread_writes: You wrote {count} file(s) but never read them back to verify. Use read_file to confirm ALL requested changes are present: {files}
prompts.tool_call_loop: You are repeating the same tool calls. Stop reading and SYNTHESIZE what you have learned so far. Respond to the user with your findings now.
prompts.stop_exploring: You have read multiple files without making any changes. If the user's prompt is a clear task, act now with edit_file or exec. If not, provide a brief text response and STOP. Do NOT continue exploring.
